unit_id.description: Canonical primary key for the execution unit. Composite and compat keys use a short implementation path plus symbol.

unit_name.description: Stable short name of the execution unit.

display_id.description: Human-friendly short key for reports and debugging.

op.description: MindSpore op name for branch units.

primitive.description: Primitive class name for branch units.

yaml_path.description: Full path to the op yaml definition file for branch units.

impl_path.description: Full implementation file path for composite or compat units.

impl_symbol.description: Implementation symbol name for composite or compat units.

compat_source.description: Compatibility source classification for compat units.

dispatch_type.description: Ascend dispatch type for branch units.

dispatch_ascend.description: Ascend dispatch target name from op yaml.

aclnn.description: ACLNN interfaces directly associated with this branch unit.

infer.description: Whether infer implementation evidence exists for this branch unit.

pyboost.description: Whether PyBoost support exists for this branch unit.

kbk.description: Whether KBK support exists for this branch unit.

bprop.description: Whether explicit bprop rule evidence exists for this branch unit.

bprop_units.description: Short names of backward execution units referenced by this unit's bprop rule.

direct_aclnn.description: ACLNN interfaces directly owned by the composite unit itself.

direct_infer.description: Whether the composite unit itself directly owns infer logic.

direct_pyboost.description: Whether the composite unit itself directly owns PyBoost support.

direct_kbk.description: Whether the composite unit itself directly owns KBK support.

direct_bprop.description: Whether the composite unit itself directly owns explicit bprop rule evidence.

leaf_units.description: Normalized leaf execution units reachable from a composite unit, each with its own coverage summary.

unit_id.description: Canonical key of the reachable leaf execution unit.

unit_name.description: Stable short name of the reachable leaf execution unit.

unit_type.description: Execution unit type of the reachable leaf.

aclnn.description: ACLNN interfaces directly associated with the reachable leaf unit.

infer.description: Whether infer implementation evidence exists for the reachable leaf unit.

pyboost.description: Whether PyBoost support exists for the reachable leaf unit.

kbk.description: Whether KBK support exists for the reachable leaf unit.

bprop.description: Whether explicit bprop rule evidence exists for the reachable leaf unit.

bprop_units.description: Short names of backward execution units referenced by the leaf unit's bprop rule.
